home.metaDescription: Cross-border trade, with greater clarity. One commercial objective, four direct routes. Say it naturally, or choose directly.
home.headline: What's your deal?
home.supporting: What are you looking to source, supply or move across borders?

voice.sub: Ponte reads your intent. Nothing is sent until you choose.

gateway.goldSignal: The gold signal follows your choice

find.label: Find demand for my products
find.title: Find
find.support: Name the product. Ponte returns global buyer demand; market and quantity refine it.

structure.label: Structure a requirement
structure.title: Structure
structure.placeholder: Paste or describe the requirement, rough text is fine...
structure.support: Start with what you know. Ponte identifies only the decisive missing facts.

check.label: Check a company
check.title: Check
check.support: Begin with a company name. Add the jurisdiction if you know it.

investigate.label: Investigate a signal
investigate.title: Investigate
investigate.placeholder: What signal or reported opportunity did you see?
investigate.support: Paste a link or describe what you saw. Ponte preserves the source and uncertainty.

home.trust: Start freely. Join only when an action needs to be saved or sent.

clarify.prompt: Ponte kept your words. Which route fits: find demand, structure a requirement, check a company, or investigate a signal?
clarify.announce: Choose a route on the mark.
clarify.emptyAnnounce: Describe your objective, or choose a route on the mark.

find.needProductSupport: Name the product. Ponte returns global buyer demand; it will not assume a product.
find.needProductAnnounce: Name the product, Ponte will not assume one.

voiceSheet.title: Speak to Ponte
voiceSheet.editHint: You can edit this before continuing.
voiceSheet.noSpeechHint: Ponte created nothing. Try again, or type it instead.
voiceSheet.deniedHint: Ponte cannot reach the microphone. Typing stays fully available, you are never blocked.
voiceSheet.unsupported: Voice input is not available in this browser
voiceSheet.unsupportedHint: This browser does not support in-page voice. Typing stays fully available.
voiceSheet.errorHint: Something interrupted the microphone. Try again, or type it instead.
